key_themes: AI-driven data center expansion and Phase III growth plans
Strong financial performance with NOI, EBITDA, and NAV gains
Positive analyst upgrades, raised price targets, and Overweight ratings
Successful 10% capital increase backed by major shareholders
Portfolio shift to high-return logistics and data centers
summary: MERLIN Properties SOCIMI (MRL.MC), the Spanish REIT, is generating strongly positive sentiment due to its aggressive pivot into data centers to capture AI infrastructure demand. Phase I has delivered strong returns with full occupancy and revaluations of €359M in 2025; the company recently completed a €767M 10% capital increase to fund Phase III (targeting significant revenue contribution by 2030). Results showed +10% NOI growth, solid FFO, and NAV per share up 7.3% YoY, with the stock rising ~65% over the past year (currently ~€15.36) and enjoying an average analyst price target of €16.88 alongside multiple upgrades.[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/MRL.MC/)[[2]](https://www.morningstar.com/stocks/xmad/mrl/quote)[[3]](https://ir.merlinproperties.com/en/excellent-year-for-merlin-with-10-growth-in-noi-and-strong-operational-momentum-in-data-centers/)
sources: 15+ news/articles from Yahoo Finance, Reuters, Tipranks, company IR, Morningstar (including CMD 2026, earnings releases, capital increase announcements), ~10 relevant X posts from semantic/keyword searches (professional commentary dominant; limited retail buzz)
